heading: Other methods of disposal
label: 704 Other methods of disposal

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Foreign excess property not disposed of under section 702 or 703 of this title may be disposed of as provided in this section.

children.heading: .—Sale, exchange, lease, or transfer
children.label: 1 .—Sale, exchange, lease, or transfer
children.text: The head of an executive agency may dispose of foreign excess property by sale, exchange, lease, or transfer, for cash, credit or other property, with or without warranty, under terms and conditions the head of the executive agency considers proper.

children.label: B
children.text: substantial benefits or the discharge of claims resulting from the compromise or settlement of claims in accordance with law.

children.heading: .—Abandonment, destruction, or donation
children.label: 3 .—Abandonment, destruction, or donation
children.text: The head of an executive agency may authorize the abandonment, destruction, or donation of foreign excess property if the property has no commercial value or if estimated costs of care and handling exceed the estimated proceeds from sale.

children.heading: .—Advertising
children.label: c .—Advertising
children.text: The head of an executive agency may dispose of foreign excess property without advertising if the head of the executive agency finds that disposal without advertising is the most practicable and advantageous means for the Federal Government to dispose of the property.

children.heading: .—Transfer of Title
children.label: d .—Transfer of Title
children.text: The head of an executive agency may execute documents to transfer title or other interests in, and take other action necessary or proper to dispose of, foreign excess property.
